creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
I did some additional testing on my laptop, which is also running
8.2 amd64. I can recreate the problem there, but only when the
VLC plugin is installed in Firefox.

To recreate you need to install multimedia/vlc with the "VLC Mozilla
Plugin" option enabled, so I am not sure if this is a Firefox or a
VLC problem. However, if I disable the VLC plugin Firefox doesn't crash,
so the problem is definately related to the plugin somehow.

The VLC version installed on both machines is vlc-1.1.8,3
